journeys.title: Account Deletion (Full Cascade)
journeys.description: Full account deletion cascade: shop ownership gate, storage cleanup (avatars, listing photos, hero banners), slug cleanup, auth user deletion with FK cascades and DB triggers.

errorCases.result: 409: Must transfer or delete shops first — show shop names as links

journeys.title: Account Settings & Profile Completeness
journeys.description: Account settings page with sections for personal info, fishing identity, notifications, seller settings, shipping addresses, linked accounts, and profile completeness tracking.

journeys.title: Saved Shipping Addresses
journeys.description: Buyer manages up to 5 saved shipping addresses with CRUD operations, default address management, and auto-promotion on delete.

journeys.title: Authenticated Cart (DB-Backed)
journeys.description: Authenticated buyer adds items to DB-backed cart with price snapshots, 30-day expiry, seller grouping, and pre-checkout validation.

journeys.title: Checkout (Escrow via Stripe Connect)
journeys.description: Buyer checkout with Stripe Connect escrow payments. Funds held until buyer confirms receipt. NOT BUILT — planned for post-MVP.

journeys.title: Recently Viewed (Dual-Source)
journeys.description: Recently viewed listings use dual-source storage: localStorage for guests, DB-backed API for authenticated users. Includes merge on login and clear history.

journeys.title: Buyer Search & Discovery
journeys.description: Authenticated buyer discovers listings via search with autocomplete, category browsing, or homepage featured. Includes filters, infinite scroll, view tracking, and recently viewed.

journeys.title: Context Switching (Member / Shop Identity)
journeys.description: Identity system overview: member/shop context switching via Zustand store, X-Nessi-Context header on every request, localStorage persistence, page load rehydration, and edge case handling.

journeys.title: Email Change (Authenticated + OTP)
journeys.description: Authenticated user changes their email address from account settings. Requires OTP verification sent to the new email.

journeys.title: Guest Browse & Discover
journeys.description: Unauthenticated user browses the marketplace by category, keyword search, or featured listings. Views listing details, seller profiles, and shop pages.

journeys.title: Guest Cart → Login → Merge
journeys.description: Guest adds items to localStorage cart, logs in, and cart silently merges to the database.

journeys.title: Guest Recently Viewed
journeys.description: Guest's listing views are tracked in localStorage, deduped and capped at 30 items. On login, views silently merge to the database.

journeys.title: Login (Email + Password)
journeys.description: Existing user logs in with email and password. Triggers background cart merge and recently-viewed merge as side effects.

journeys.title: Logout
journeys.description: User logs out, clearing session cookies, resetting context store, and redirecting to homepage.

journeys.title: Onboarding Wizard (Buyer vs Seller Path)
journeys.description: Branching wizard after first signup. Buyer path (4 steps) vs Seller path (5 steps). Includes post-onboarding seller opt-in for users who initially chose buyer.

journeys.title: Password Reset (3-Step OTP)
journeys.description: User resets forgotten password via a 3-step flow: enter email, verify OTP code, set new password.

journeys.title: Route Protection (proxy.ts)
journeys.description: proxy.ts intercepts every request to enforce auth on /dashboard/* routes, redirect completed onboarding users, and refresh session cookies on public pages.

journeys.title: Seller Context (Member vs Shop)
journeys.description: Listings are created under either member or shop context, controlled by the X-Nessi-Context header. Determines where the listing appears publicly.

journeys.title: Listing Lifecycle (Create, Edit, Manage)
journeys.description: Full listing lifecycle: 5-step create wizard with photo upload, edit wizard with partial saves, dashboard management with status tabs, and listing actions (publish, sold, archive, duplicate, delete).

journeys.title: Listing Social Sharing
journeys.description: Share listing via Web Share API (mobile) or clipboard copy (desktop). Handles API availability, cancellation, and clipboard permission gracefully.

journeys.title: Seller Toggle (On/Off)
journeys.description: User toggles seller status on or off from account settings. Toggling off requires no active listings or orders, and hides all listings from search.

journeys.title: Create Shop
journeys.description: User creates a new shop via onboarding, dashboard, or seller opt-in modal. Includes slug generation, availability check, and atomic server-side setup (slug reservation, shop row, owner membership, seller flag).

journeys.title: Shop Invite → Accept (or Register & Auto-Accept)
journeys.description: A user receives a shop invite email, lands on the invite page, and either accepts directly (if authenticated) or registers a new account with auto-accept.

errorCases.condition: Duplicate pending invite for same email

journeys.title: Shop Member Journey (Join, Work, Leave)
journeys.description: Shop member lifecycle: switch to shop context, work within role-based permissions, leave shop with confirmation, and handle context revocation when removed by owner.

journeys.title: Shop Member Management (Invite, Remove, Roles)
journeys.description: Owner manages shop members: invite via email, resend/revoke invites, remove members, and assign roles with permission enforcement.

journeys.title: Shop Ownership Transfer (Request → Accept → Cancel)
journeys.description: Owner initiates ownership transfer to another member. Transferee receives email link, accepts on a dedicated page. Includes atomic role swap and cancellation flow.

journeys.title: Shop Roles & Permissions
journeys.description: Roles & Permissions page showing system role cards (Owner, Manager, Contributor) with permission matrix. Custom roles gated behind premium plan.

journeys.title: Shop Settings & Deletion
journeys.description: Shop settings page with sections for details, hero banner, subscription (planned), and shop deletion with full storage cleanup.

journeys.title: Signup (Email + OTP)
journeys.description: New user registers with email and password, verifies via 6-digit OTP code, and gets a session. Includes invite auto-accept, cart merge, and recently-viewed merge as background side effects.
